description: Endpoint-agnostic API test stencil. The agent compares discovered endpoints against this checklist before generating tests.

test_cases.description: Endpoint accepts a valid request and returns the expected successful status code and response body.
Endpoint receives a syntactically valid but unknown resource identifier and returns a not-found error.
Endpoint receives a path parameter with an invalid data type and returns a validation error.
Endpoint receives no JSON payload and returns a validation or bad-request error.
Endpoint receives a payload with one required field missing or blank and returns a validation or bad-request error.
Endpoint receives a payload field with the wrong data type and returns a validation error.
Endpoint receives malformed JSON and returns a validation or bad-request error.
